ModMetaData.name: Pawn Badge - US Army Civil War Ranks
ModMetaData.author: Snare
ModMetaData.description:
US Army Civil War Ranks (1861-1865)
Requires PawnBadge-FanFork by Ogliss. Rangel Reale (original author) Saucy_Pigeon (updated code) LeninsCat (fixed manifest error, updated textures)
Made for Bersia, if theres a badge set you want to see hit me up.
